_comment: Region tracking config - tracks how many people (agents) are in each region, like Firestorm's world map
_note_enabled: Set 'enabled: false' to completely disable tracking and preserve memory
_note_accounts: Only ONE logged-in account is needed to check all regions. If that account logs off, automatically switches to another.
_note_cleanup: Old records (older than 32 days) are automatically deleted once per day to prevent database bloat
